name: agentic-llm-router
description: Autonomous LLM Procurement & Payment Router with USDC on Arc

scripts.install:all: npm install && npm install --workspace=router-backend && npm install --workspace=provider-wrappers && npm install --workspace=frontend && npm install --workspace=shared
scripts.build:all: npm run build --workspace=shared && npm run build --workspace=router-backend && npm run build --workspace=provider-wrappers && npm run build --workspace=frontend
scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev --workspace=router-backend" "npm run dev --workspace=provider-wrappers" "npm run dev --workspace=frontend"
